summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of MarocSphere redesigned landing page. All landing page sections render correctly with trendy gradient styles and glass morphism effects. No Emergent branding found anywhere. All navigation and CTA buttons work correctly. Mobile responsive design is excellent.
passed_tests: Hero section loads with background image, gradient text, and proper styling
Hero CTA 'Start Planning Free' button navigates to /concierge
Hero CTA 'Chat with AI' button navigates to /chat
Stats bar displays all 4 stats (50K+ travelers, 4.9 rating, 100% verified, 12 cities)
Destinations section shows 6 destination cards with safety badges (Safe/Caution)
How It Works section displays 3 steps correctly
Features section shows 4 feature cards (AI Concierge, Interactive Map, Safety Dashboard, Smart Chat)
Testimonials carousel with navigation buttons (prev/next) working
FAQ accordion expand/collapse functionality working (5 FAQ items)
CTA section with 'Create Free Account' button present
Navigation to AI Concierge page (/concierge) working
Navigation to Map page (/map) working
Navigation to Safety page (/safety) working
SOS button visible in navbar
Mobile responsive design - all sections render correctly on mobile (390x844)
Mobile menu toggle and navigation items work correctly
Footer displays correctly with MarocSphere branding
No Emergent branding visible anywhere on the site
SEO meta tags properly set (title, description, og:tags, Twitter cards)
Structured data (JSON-LD) for Organization, WebSite, and TravelAgency present

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All landing page features working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign complete and verified. All sections (Hero, Stats, Destinations, How It Works, Features, Testimonials, FAQ, CTA, Footer) working correctly. Mobile responsive design verified. No Emergent branding present. Previous iteration noted OpenAI API budget exceeded issue for itinerary generation - that issue is unrelated to landing page and would need separate testing.
